description: Synthetic SaaS issue code taxonomy used by VertexCloud's support engineering. Codes are used in ticket categorisation, log events, and runbook indexing. Modelled on common public conventions (HTTP, OAuth, SAML) without copying any single vendor's proprietary scheme.

codes.name: Access token expired
codes.description: Bearer token presented at API edge is past its expiry timestamp.
codes.typical_action: Issue refresh token flow. If refresh fails, customer must re-authenticate.

codes.name: Access token malformed or unknown
codes.description: Token cannot be decoded, signature is invalid, or token is not in the active key set.
codes.typical_action: Investigate IdP key rotation. Confirm client is using current public keys.

codes.name: Permission denied
codes.description: Authenticated principal lacks required scope or role for the requested resource.
codes.typical_action: Confirm scope grant in OAuth client config. Confirm role assignment in customer admin console.

codes.name: OAuth client config drift
codes.description: OAuth client redirect URIs, scopes, or secrets have drifted from the registered configuration.
codes.typical_action: Diff registered config against client's current config. Re-register if needed.

codes.name: SAML / SSO config mismatch
codes.description: SAML metadata, certificate, or attribute mapping mismatched between IdP and VertexCloud.
codes.typical_action: Re-import IdP metadata. Verify NameID format and attribute claims.

codes.name: MFA enforcement failure
codes.description: Customer has MFA enforced but flow fails to challenge or accept response.
codes.typical_action: Inspect MFA challenge logs. Verify customer's MFA policy configuration.

codes.name: Per-user rate limit exceeded
codes.description: Single user exceeded the per-user request rate limit.
codes.typical_action: Confirm with customer. Recommend client-side backoff. No platform action.

codes.name: Per-tenant rate limit exceeded
codes.description: Tenant-wide request rate exceeded the contracted limit.
codes.typical_action: Check tenant tier and contracted limit. Consider temporary uplift if justified.

codes.name: Daily API quota exhausted
codes.description: Tenant exhausted its daily request quota.
codes.typical_action: Confirm contracted quota. Educate customer on quota windows. Consider plan upgrade conversation.

codes.name: Burst limit exceeded
codes.description: Tenant exceeded the short-window burst limit.
codes.typical_action: Recommend exponential backoff. Confirm no retry-storm pattern in customer's client.

codes.name: Webhook endpoint timeout
codes.description: Customer's webhook endpoint did not respond within the timeout (typically 10s).
codes.typical_action: Confirm endpoint reachability. Recommend customer move heavy work behind a queue.

codes.name: Webhook signature verification failed
codes.description: Receiver reports HMAC signature does not validate against the shared secret.
codes.typical_action: Verify shared secret. Verify signing algorithm and canonicalisation. Check for trailing whitespace or charset issues.

codes.name: Webhook retry budget exhausted
codes.description: Webhook retried up to the maximum and remains undelivered.
codes.typical_action: Confirm endpoint health. Surface dead-letter queue contents. Recommend customer enable replay-by-time.

codes.name: Webhook endpoint returning 5xx
codes.description: Endpoint is reachable but returning server errors.
codes.typical_action: Customer-side issue. Provide endpoint logs from VertexCloud's side. Recommend customer investigate.

codes.name: Webhook payload over size limit
codes.description: Payload exceeds the documented size cap (1 MB).
codes.typical_action: Confirm payload contents. Recommend customer subscribe to summary events with detail-fetch pattern.

codes.name: Replication lag above threshold
codes.description: Lag between source product and target product or customer warehouse exceeds threshold (typically 5 minutes).
codes.typical_action: Investigate VC-Sync worker pool, downstream load, and recent schema changes.

codes.name: Record present in source, missing in target
codes.description: A specific record exists in the originating product but not in the target system.
codes.typical_action: Trace sync event log. Confirm whether filter rules or permissions excluded it.

codes.name: Duplicate records produced
codes.description: Same logical record appears twice in target due to dedup-key regeneration.
codes.typical_action: Inspect dedup-key derivation. Look for recent client-library upgrades that changed key shape.

codes.name: Schema drift between source and target
codes.description: Source produced a payload field not understood by target schema.
codes.typical_action: Confirm schema version pinning. Coordinate schema migration if intentional.

codes.name: Conflicting concurrent writes
codes.description: Two writers updated the same record within the conflict window.
codes.typical_action: Surface conflict resolution policy (last-write-wins or CRDT). Confirm with customer which version to retain.

codes.name: Cross-tenant access attempt
codes.description: Request from one tenant attempted to access another tenant's resource. Denied at gateway.
codes.typical_action: P1 if successful, P3 if denied. Investigate caller identity. Audit log review.

codes.name: Role does not match expected scope
codes.description: User's role grants access to scope smaller than the resource requires.
codes.typical_action: Confirm role assignment with customer admin. Confirm scope hierarchy is up to date.

codes.name: Permission downgraded mid-session
codes.description: User had permission at session start, lost it mid-session via admin change.
codes.typical_action: Expected behaviour. Customer-comms only. No platform action.

codes.name: Required customer consent missing
codes.description: Action requires explicit data-processing consent which is not on file.
codes.typical_action: Surface consent prompt to customer admin. Block action until consent recorded.

codes.name: Third-party connector unavailable
codes.description: Connector to external service (Salesforce, Slack, NetSuite, etc.) is not responding.
codes.typical_action: Confirm third-party status. Failover to backup connector if configured. Customer comms.

codes.name: Inbound payload schema mismatch
codes.description: Third-party system sent payload that does not conform to expected schema.
codes.typical_action: Confirm third-party API version. Update mapping if schema changed.

codes.name: Third-party credential expired
codes.description: OAuth refresh token or API key for third-party integration has expired.
codes.typical_action: Customer admin must re-authenticate the integration.

codes.name: p95 latency above SLO
codes.description: Service p95 latency above the published SLO over rolling 15-minute window.
codes.typical_action: Trace recent deploys, downstream dependency health, and tenant-skew.

codes.name: Downstream dependency degraded
codes.description: A platform dependency (database, cache, message bus) is degraded and propagating latency upstream.
codes.typical_action: Engage Platform Reliability. Customer-facing comms via status page if SLO at risk.

codes.name: Service unavailable
codes.description: Service returning 503 to all callers.
codes.typical_action: P1. Engage incident bridge. Status page update.
